description:
A junior designer created a preliminary solar layout in SketchUp, but it contains critical errors. The file 'design_review_required.skp' is currently open. Your task is to perform QA and fix the design:
1. Identify the North-facing roof slope (the slope pointing towards the solid green axis direction) and DELETE ALL solar panels on this face (they will not produce enough energy).
2. Identify the South-facing roof slope (the slope pointing towards the negative green axis). There is a large brick chimney here. DELETE ONLY the solar panels that are colliding with or touching the chimney.
3. Keep all other valid solar panels on the South face intact.
4. Save your corrected model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\remediated_design.skp'.
